$comment: version 1. FIELD-additive superset of vicario review-findings: extra optional fields are ignored by vicario's validator. The dimension enum is the canonical 9-value SHARED contract (vicario's six + lens's test/risk/comment); vicario adopts the same enum so all dimensions validate both ways — no mapping layer. Until the vicario repo widens its enum to match (tracked), only the 6 shared dimensions round-trip to an un-updated vicario; coordinate enum changes across both repos.
title: lens review-findings

voteDegraded.$comment: carried for vicario parity; lens v1 does not set it

emptyScope.$comment: true only on empty-diff/no-repo; lets a caller distinguish 'nothing to review' from a clean zero-finding review. Field-additive — vicario's validator ignores it (only the dimension enum is co-owned).

severityTrend.$comment: this run's recommendedEscalation vs the prior run's, keyed on the 4-value escalation not the 3-value verdict (per skills/review/references/reconcile.md). Optional — set by reconcile/compute-only, never by the engine; vicario's validator ignores it.

delta.$comment: aggregate iteration delta vs the prior run; read by an orchestrator's convergence decision and surfaced as the human-facing iteration delta. Optional — set by reconcile/compute-only, never by the engine.
